name: @dbos-argus/sample-app
description: Turborepo task runner shim for the Python DBOS sample app.

scripts.demo: trap 'kill 0' INT TERM; uv run argus-simulator & uv run argus-scheduler & uv run argus-heartbeat-runner & wait
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.build: echo 'sample-app build is handled via uv workspaces'
